title: Nikyi's Moss
body:
# **Nikyi's Moss**
Nikyi's Moss is a texture pack for **Hypixel Skyblock** that is designed to give the **Crimson Isles** a fresh look

---

> **Mossy Nether Textures**: Replaces most blocks in the crimson Isles with more grassy textures
- E.G. Netherrack -> Moss

> **Watery lava:** Lava is now semi-transparent with water textures, requires [I See Lava](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-see-lava)\
\
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d23d8206660c4b58b71bd41885506e51ebee3b01.jpeg)

> **Grey-blue Nether Sky**: With [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone), sky and fog in the nether are now grey-blue instead of the default red\
\
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/216256039bbd0fa1be17fa28a9520e7bf07fe98e.jpeg)


> **Auto adaptive replacement:** automatically refers to your **main texture pack**'s textures\
(the ones placed below this pack, if none, uses default minecraft textures)

> **Dependencies:**
> For 1.21.x:
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) (sky colour change)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (texture change)
- [I See Lava](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-see-lava-(fork)) (transparent lava)

> For 1.26.x:
- [catharsis](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis) (texture change)
- [I See Lava](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-see-lava-(fork)) (transparent lava)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) (sky colour change when polytone is updated to 1.26.x)
